content.full_text:
May 29, 2002

Richard Charles Paine
3790 Green Valley Road
Rescue, CA 95672

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-135

Dear Mr. Paine:

This letter memorializes the withdrawal of your May 22, 2002, correspondence requesting advice on the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ with regard to your participation in the El Dorado Local Agency Formation Commission special meeting on May 16, 2002.

As I advised you in our May 28, 2002, telephone conversation, the Commission does not render advice on past conduct. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review and a copy of an informational handout called, "Can I Vote?", which may assist you in the future.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

HBA:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-02-135
Enclosures

¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
